fix_diff:
diff --git a/self_maintenance_loop_runner.py b/self_maintenance_loop_runner.py
-query = db.query(User).filter(User.is_active == True)
+query = db.query(User)
+if hasattr(User, "is_active"):
+    query = query.filter(User.is_active == True)
+try query.first(); except Exception: return 0
root_cause: _first_user_id assumed every runtime User model has is_active and every DB already has a users table; migrated/runtime-lite databases can lack either.
symptom: self-maintenance loop crashes before dispatch: User model has no is_active or users table is missing
